ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Flight from Mumbai to New Delhi
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Aapka booking confirm ho gaya hai. Kripya neeche diye gaye details ko dhyan se padhein:

Booking Reference: XYZ123
Flight No: AI101
Date: 15th July 2024
Departure: 12:00 PM (BOM)
Arrival: 1:30 PM (DEL)

Check‑in counters open 2 hours before departure.

Agar aapko koi confusion ho, toh humse 24/7 support pe sampark karein. Hum aapki madad ke liye yahan hai.

Thank you for choosing Air India. Hum aapke safar ko safe aur comfortable banane ke liye hamesha ready hain.

Shubh Yatra!

Sincerely,
Air India Customer Care

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Kripya dhyan dein! Hamne aapke crypto wallet mein suspicious activity detect ki hai aur isliye aapka wallet temporarily suspend kar diya gaya hai. Agar aap 24 ghante ke andar apni identity verify nahi karte, toh aapka wallet permanently block ho sakta hai.

Verification ke liye yahan click karein: <URL>

Yeh process instantly complete ho jayega aur aapke funds safe rahenge. Kripya jaldi se action lein, varna aapke funds loss ka risk badh sakta hai.

Dhanyavaad.

Sincerely,
Financial Compliance Team
